key_decisions: Multi-file architecture (index.html + styles.css + app.js) instead of single file

file_manifest.index.html: HTML shell (128 lines) - CDN links, semantic structure, modal, drilldown, toast
file_manifest.styles.css: Design system (2012 lines) - variables, 3 themes, all components, print, presentation
file_manifest.app.js: Application logic (2114 lines) - auth, API, computation, 6 tab renderers, charts
